description: Style NoteIndia's design genius satya paul comes up with this gorgeous printed kurti with an easy, drapey silhouette. Guaranteed to flatter your figure, style this with colour block trousers or leggings.Product DetailsCream and brown semi diaphanous kurti, has a V-neckline, short sleeves, bead embellishments below the bust and a vented hemMaterial and CareSyntheticDry cleanSize and FitRegular fitThe model (height 5'8" and chest 33") is wearing a size M
